architecture.key_insight: Small mods don't need deep package hierarchies. Everything in one package with clear class naming is simpler and more maintainable than over-engineering.

packages.api: Public API interfaces for other mods to implement

key_patterns.name: API-First Design
key_patterns.description: Trinkets exposes a clean API interface that other mods implement. The mod itself then USES its own API.
key_patterns.example: Trinket interface → SurvivalTrinketSlot implements it → CreativeTrinketSlot extends it

key_patterns.name: Flat for Small Mods
key_patterns.description: When a mod has <20 classes, a flat package structure is cleaner than deep hierarchies. Only split into sub-packages when a package exceeds 20-30 files.
key_patterns.threshold: 20 classes: stay flat | 50 classes: split into 2-3 sub-packages | 100+: need content/foundation split
